# Supported Countries

Acme Shop currently offers international shipping to Canada, the United Kingdom, the European Union, Australia, and Japan. They periodically expand their list of supported countries, but shipping to other destinations is not yet available. For supported countries, customers can see the landed cost, which includes duties, prior to completing their checkout to avoid any unexpected charges at delivery.

[Source: international_shipping.md#supported-countries]
